verification_gate: Every candidate is source-identity and digest bound; target ISA, host ABI, POSIX/filesystem/process support, hardware-switch status, release maturity, and portability relevance are evidenced; absence or mismatch is recorded honestly.

proof_summary: ARCHBP-019 is complete: the newer upstream ruvnet VM reference is verified and identity-bound in the merged evidence document ARCHBP-019-ruvnet-vm-verification.md (sha256 3ca87bb9…, lifeos main bc0c7d9 / PR #78). Every candidate is source-identity and digest bound — ruvnet/rvm at af97d18f, ruvnet/RuVector at f3de1724, crates.io artifacts by sha256, npm by shasum — and the capability matrix re-evidences target ISA (aarch64-unknown-none), the 8/13-call WASM host ABI with no POSIX/filesystem/process surface, the stubbed hardware switch, and zero-release maturity at both upstream HEADs, leaving the FOUNDATION_ECOSYSTEM_MAP §5.3 disposition standing. Absences and mismatches (ruvnet/optimizer 404) are recorded honestly with inference flagged, and the read-only probe plan P1–P9 makes the verification reproducible. This proof binds the gate clauses to the document's sections and exact digest.
